//PROTOCOLO Do 'protocolo'
//QRCode do 'QrCode'
&XmlReader.OpenFromString(&NfeArqXml)
&ret = &XmlReader.ReadType(1, 'infNFe') if &ret <> 0
&NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.versao = &XmlReader.GetAttributeByName('versao') //versão &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.Id = &XmlReader.GetAttributeByName('Id') //Id NFe &XmlReader.Read()
//LEITURA XML Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infNFe'
Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ide' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'ide' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'emit' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'emit' // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'avulsa' // &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... // Do 'avulsa' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dest' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'dest' // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'retirada' // &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... // Do 'retirada' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'entrega' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'entrega' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'det' &det = new() //Cria uma nova instancia do item... &det.nItem = &XmlReader.GetAttributeByName('nItem') //Id do item &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'det' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'total' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'total' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'transp' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'transp' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cobr' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'cobr' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'pag' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'pag' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infAdic' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'infAdic' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infNFeSupl' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'infNFeSupl' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'exporta' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'exporta' EndCase
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo //infNFe endif
&XmlReader.close() //padraousuario.Call('G', 'JEAN', 1, 1, &NfeProc.ToXml(), &PadDtaMod)
//PROTOCOLO Sub 'protocolo' &XmlReader.OpenFromString(&NfeArqXml) &ret = &XmlReader.ReadType(1, 'protNFe')
&NfeProc.protNFe.versao = &XmlReader.GetAttributeByName('versao') //versão
&XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... do 'protNFe'
&XmlReader.Close() EndSub
sub 'QrCode' &auxNfeArqXml = &NfeArqXml.ToString() &Inicio = &auxNfeArqXml.IndexOf('<![CDATA[', 1) &Fim = &auxNfeArqXml.IndexOf(']]>', 2) if &Inicio <> 0 and &Fim <> 0 &Tamanho = &Fim - &Inicio //&Tamanho += 1 &VarChar = &auxNfeArqXml.Substring(&Inicio, &Tamanho) &VarChar = &VarChar.Replace('<![CDATA[', '') &VarChar = &VarChar.Replace(']]>', '')
&VarChar = trim(&VarChar) &valqrCode = gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 1, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 2, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 3, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 4, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 5, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 6, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 7, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 8, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 9, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 10, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 11, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 12, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 13, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 14, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 15, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 16, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 17, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 18, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 19, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 20, 100)
&NfeProc.NFe.infNFeSupl.qrCode = &valqrCode
Else &Inicio = &auxNfeArqXml.IndexOf('<qrCode>', 1) &Fim = &auxNfeArqXml.IndexOf('</qrCode>', 2) if &Inicio <> 0 and &Fim <> 0
&Tamanho = &Fim - &Inicio //&Tamanho += 1 &VarChar = &auxNfeArqXml.Substring(&Inicio, &Tamanho) &VarChar = &VarChar.Replace('<qrCode>', '') &VarChar = &VarChar.Replace('</qrCode>', '')
&VarChar = trim(&VarChar) &valqrCode = gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 1, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 2, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 3, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 4, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 5, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 6, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 7, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 8, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 9, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 10, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 11, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 12, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 13, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 14, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 15, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 16, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 17, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 18, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 19, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 20, 100)
&NfeProc.NFe.infNFeSupl.qrCode = &valqrCode Endif EndIF EndSub
sub 'protNFe' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'protNFe'
Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infProt' &NfeProc.protNFe.infProt.Id = &XmlReader.GetAttributeByName('Id') //versão &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... do 'infProt' EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo //</protNFe> Endsub
sub 'infProt' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infProt'
Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'tpAmb' &NfeProc.protNFe.infProt.tpAmb.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'verAplic' &NfeProc.protNFe.infProt.verAplic = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'chNFe' &NfeProc.protNFe.infProt.chNFe = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dhRecbto' &NfeProc.protNFe.infProt.dhRecbto = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nProt' &NfeProc.protNFe.infProt.nProt = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'digVal' &NfeProc.protNFe.infProt.digVal = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cStat' &NfeProc.protNFe.infProt.cStat = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xMotivo' &NfeProc.protNFe.infProt.xMotivo = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo //</infProt> EndSub
//IDENTIFICACAO Sub 'ide' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'ide' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cUF' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.cUF.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cNF' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.cNF = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'natOp' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.natOp = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'mod' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.mod.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'serie' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.serie = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nNF' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.nNF = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dEmi' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.dhEmi = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dhEmi' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.dhEmi = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dhSaiEnt' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.dhSaiEnt = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'hSaiEnt' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.dhSaiEnt = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'tpNF' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.tpNF = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'idDest' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.idDest = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cMunFG' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.cMunFG = &XmlReader.Value
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'NFref' &XmlReader.Read() do 'NFref'
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'tpImp' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.tpImp = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'tpEmis' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.tpEmis = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cDV' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.cDV = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'tpAmb' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.tpAmb.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'finNFe' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.finNFe.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'indFinal' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.indFinal = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'indPres' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.indPres = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'procEmi' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.procEmi.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'verProc' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.verProc = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dhCont' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.dhCont = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xJust' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.xJust = &XmlReader.Value EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo EndSub
Sub 'NFref'
Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'NFref' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'refNFe' &NFref = new() &NFref.refNFe = &XmlReader.Value &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.NFrefs.Add(&NFref)
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'refNF' &XmlReader.Read() &NFref = new() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'refNF' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cUF' &NFref.refNF.cUF.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'AAMM' &NFref.refNF.AAMM = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CNPJ' &NFref.refNF.CNPJ = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'mod' &NFref.refNF.mod = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'serie' &NFref.refNF.serie = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nNF' &NFref.refNF.nNF = &XmlReader.Value EndCase &XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo //</refNF> &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.NFrefs.Add(&NFref)
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'refNFP' &XmlReader.Read() do 'refNFP'
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'refCTe' &NFref = new() &NFref.refCTe = &XmlReader.Value &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.NFrefs.Add(&NFref)
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'refECF' &XmlReader.Read() &NFref = new() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'refECF' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'mod' &NFref.refECF.mod = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nECF' &NFref.refECF.nECF = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nCOO' &NFref.refECF.nCOO = &XmlReader.Value EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo //</refECF> &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.NFrefs.Add(&NFref) EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo //</NFref> EndSUb
sub 'refNFP' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'refNFP' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cUF' &NFref.refNFP.cUF.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'AAMM' &NFref.refNFP.AAMM = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CNPJ' &NFref.refNFP.CNPJ = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CPF' &NFref.refNFP.CPF = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'IE' &NFref.refNFP.IE = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'mod' &NFref.refNFP.mod = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'serie' &NFref.refNFP.serie = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nNF' &NFref.refNFP.nNF = &XmlReader.Value EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo //</refNFP> &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.NFrefs.Add(&NFref) EndSub
//EMITENTE Sub 'emit' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'emit' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CNPJ' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.CNPJ = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CPF' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.CPF = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xNome' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.xNome = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xFant' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.xFant = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'enderEmit' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'enderEmit' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xLgr' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.enderEmit.xLgr = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nro' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.enderEmit.nro = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xCpl' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.enderEmit.xCpl = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xBairro' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.enderEmit.xBairro = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cMun' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.enderEmit.cMun = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xMun' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.enderEmit.xMun = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'UF' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.enderEmit.UF.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CEP' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.enderEmit.CEP = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cPais' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.enderEmit.cPais = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xPais' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.enderEmit.xPais= &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'fone' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.enderEmit.fone = &XmlReader.Value EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo Case &XmlReader.Name = 'IE' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.IE = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'IEST' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.IEST = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'IM' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.IM = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CNAE' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.CNAE = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CRT' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.emit.CRT = &XmlReader.Value
EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo EndSub
//DESTINATARIO Sub 'dest' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'dest' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'idEstrangeiro' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.idEstrangeiro = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CNPJ' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.CNPJ = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CPF' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.CPF = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xNome' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.xNome = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'enderDest' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'enderDest' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xLgr' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.enderDest.xLgr = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nro' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.enderDest.nro = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xCpl' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.enderDest.xCpl = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xBairro' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.enderDest.xBairro = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cMun' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.enderDest.cMun = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xMun' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.enderDest.xMun = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'UF' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.enderDest.UF.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CEP' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.enderDest.CEP = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cPais' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.enderDest.cPais = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xPais' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.enderDest.xPais = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'fone' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.enderDest.fone = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'indIeDest' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.indIEDest = &XmlReader.Value EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo Case &XmlReader.Name = 'IE' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.IE = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ISUF' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.ISUF = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'email' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.dest.email = &XmlReader.Value EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo EndSub
////Leitura da tag <retirada> //Sub 'retirada' // Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'retirada' // Do Case // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CNPJ' // &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.retirada.CNPJ = &XmlReader.Value // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CPF' // &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.retirada.CPF = &XmlReader.Value // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xLgr' // &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.retirada.xLgr = &XmlReader.Value // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nro' // &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.retirada.nro = &XmlReader.Value // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xCpl' // &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.retirada.xCpl = &XmlReader.Value // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xBairro' // &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.retirada.xBairro = &XmlReader.Value // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cMun' // &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.retirada.cMun = &XmlReader.Value // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xMun' // &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.retirada.xMun = &XmlReader.Value // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'UF' // &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.retirada.UF.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) // EndCase // &XmlReader.Read() // if &XmlReader.EOF // Exit // endif // EndDo //EndSub
//Leitura da tag <entrega> Sub 'entrega' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'entrega' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CNPJ' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.entrega.CNPJ = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CPF' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.entrega.CPF = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xLgr' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.entrega.xLgr = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nro' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.entrega.nro = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CEP' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.entrega.CEP = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xCpl' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.entrega.xCpl = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xBairro' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.entrega.xBairro = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cMun' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.entrega.cMun = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xMun' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.entrega.xMun = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'UF' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.entrega.UF.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo EndSub
//PRODUTOS Sub 'det' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'det' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'prod' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'prod' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cProd' &det.prod.cProd = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cEAN' &det.prod.cEAN = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xProd' &det.prod.xProd = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'NCM' &det.prod.NCM = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'NVE' &det.prod.NVEs.Add(&XmlReader.Value.Trim()) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'EXTIPI' &det.prod.EXTIPI = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CFOP' &det.prod.CFOP.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'uCom' &det.prod.uCom = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'qCom' &det.prod.qCom = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vUnCom' &det.prod.vUnCom = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vProd' &det.prod.vProd = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cEANTrib' &det.prod.cEANTrib = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'uTrib' &det.prod.uTrib = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'qTrib' &det.prod.qTrib = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vUnTrib' &det.prod.vUnTrib = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vFrete' &det.prod.vFrete = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vSeg' &det.prod.vSeg = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vDesc' &det.prod.vDesc = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vOutro' &det.prod.vOutro = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cBenef' &det.prod.cBenef = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'indTot' &det.prod.indTot = &XmlReader.Value // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'DI' // &DI = new() // &XmlReader.Read() // Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'DI' // Do Case // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nDI' // &DI.nDI = &XmlReader.Value // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dDI' // &DI.dDI = &XmlReader.Value // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xLocDesemb' // &DI.xLocDesemb = &XmlReader.Value // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'UFDesemb' // &DI.UFDesemb.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dDesemb' // &DI.dDesemb = &XmlReader.Value // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cExportador' // &DI.cExportador = &XmlReader.Value // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'adi' // &adi = new() // &XmlReader.Read() // Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'adi' // Do Case // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nAdicao' // &adi.nAdicao = &XmlReader.Value // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nSeqAdic' // &adi.nSeqAdic = &XmlReader.Value // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cFabricante' // &adi.cFabricante = &XmlReader.Value // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vDescDI' // &adi.vDescDI = &XmlReader.Value // EndCase // &XmlReader.Read() // if &XmlReader.EOF // Exit // endif // // EndDo //</adi> // &DI.adis.Add(&adi) // EndCase // &XmlReader.Read() // if &XmlReader.EOF // Exit // endif // // EndDo //</DI> // &det.prod.DIs.Add(&DI) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'rastro' &rastro = new() &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'rastro' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nLote' &rastro.nLote = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'qLote' &rastro.qLote = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dFab' &rastro.dFab = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dVal' &rastro.dVal = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo //rastro &det.prod.rastros.Add(&rastro) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xPed'

&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.pag.detPag.Add(&pag) EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
//COBRANCA Sub 'cobr' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'cobr' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'fat' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'fat' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nFat' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.cobr.fat.nFat = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vOrig' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.cobr.fat.vOrig = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vLiq' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.cobr.fat.vLiq = &XmlReader.Value EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo //</fat> Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dup' &dup = new() &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'dup' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nDup' &dup.nDup = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dVenc' &dup.dVenc = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vDup' &dup.vDup = &XmlReader.Value EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo //</dup> &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.cobr.dups.Add(&dup) EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo EndSub
//ADICIONAIS Sub 'infAdic' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infAdic' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infAdFisco' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.infAdic.infAdFisco = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infCpl' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.infAdic.infCpl = &XmlReader.Value // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'obsCont' // &obsCont = new() // &XmlReader.Read() // Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'obsCont' // Do Case // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xTexto' // &obsCont.xTexto = &XmlReader.Value // EndCase // &XmlReader.Read() // if &XmlReader.EOF // Exit // endif // // EndDo //</obsCont> // &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.infAdic.obsConts.Add(&obsCont) // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'obsFisco' // &obsFisco = new() // &XmlReader.Read() // Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'obsFisco' // Do Case // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xTexto' // &obsFisco.xTexto = &XmlReader.Value // EndCase // &XmlReader.Read() // EndDo //</obsCont> // &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.infAdic.obsFiscos.Add(&obsFisco) // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'procRef' // &procRef = new() // &XmlReader.Read() // Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'procRef' // Do Case // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nProc' // &procRef.nProc = &XmlReader.Value // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'indProc' // &procRef.indProc = &XmlReader.Value // EndCase // &XmlReader.Read() // if &XmlReader.EOF // Exit // endif // // EndDo //</procRef> // &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.infAdic.procRefs.Add(&procRef) EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo //</infAdic> EndSub
//ADICIONAIS Sub 'infNFeSupl' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infNFeSupl' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'qrCode' &valqrCode = &XmlReader.Value
if not &valqrCode.IsEmpty() &NfeProc.NFe.infNFeSupl.qrCode = &valqrCode.Trim() Endif EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo //</infAdic> EndSub
//EXPORTACAO Sub 'exporta' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'exporta' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'UFSaidaPais' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.exporta.UFSaidaPais.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xLocExporta' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.exporta.xLocExporta = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xLocDespacho' &NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.exporta.xLocDespacho = &XmlReader.Value EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo //</exporta> EndSub
